baseline.name: Baseline Authentication
baseline.description: Standard username/password typing to establish calm-state baseline

tasks.prompt: Type your username and password 15 times at your normal pace
instructions: Type at your normal, comfortable speed
No time pressure - take your time
This establishes your baseline typing pattern

credentials.password_placeholder: Type your actual password each time

transcription.name: Code Transcription
transcription.description: Type pre-written Java code to capture pure motor rhythm without cognitive load

tasks.prompt: Transcribe the following Java code exactly as shown
instructions: Copy the code character-by-character including all brackets, semicolons and capitalisation
This measures your typing mechanics without problem-solving

stress.name: Timed Coding Challenge
stress.description: Time-pressured task to capture stress-induced typing pattern changes

tasks.prompt: Complete this coding challenge in 2 minutes
instructions: ⏱️ You have 2 minutes to complete this task
Don't worry if you don't finish - this measures your typing under pressure
The timer will be visible throughout

challenges.name: FizzBuzz
challenges.description: Write a function that prints numbers 1-100, but for multiples of 3 print 'Fizz', for multiples of 5 print 'Buzz', and for multiples of both print 'FizzBuzz'

challenges.name: String Reversal
challenges.description: Write a function that reverses a string without using built-in reverse methods

challenges.name: Sum of Multiples
challenges.description: Write a function that returns the sum of all numbers between 1-1000 that are divisible by 3 or 5

cognitive.name: Complex Logic Implementation
cognitive.description: High cognitive load task to capture typing under mental effort

tasks.prompt: Implement the following algorithm with specific constraints
instructions: This task requires logical reasoning - take your time
There's no time limit, but work at a reasonable pace

challenges.name: Recursive Fibonacci with Memoization
challenges.description: Implement a recursive Fibonacci function with memoization to optimize performance. The function should cache previously computed values.
requirements: Must implement memoization using a dictionary
Include a helper function if needed
challenges.starter_code:
def fibonacci_memo(n, memo=None):
    # Your implementation here
    pass

# Test your function
print(fibonacci_memo(20))

challenges.name: Binary Search Tree Implementation
challenges.description: Implement a basic Binary Search Tree class with insert and search methods
requirements: Implement search(value) method that returns True/False

challenges.name: Valid Parentheses Checker
challenges.description: Write a function that validates if a string of brackets/parentheses is balanced
requirements: Return True if balanced, False otherwise
challenges.starter_code:
def is_valid_parentheses(s):
    # Your implementation here
    return False

# Test cases
print(is_valid_parentheses('({[]})'))
print(is_valid_parentheses('([)]'))

enrollment_instructions.overview: Complete all 4 phases to enable keystroke authentication
recommendations: Complete phases across multiple days for best results
Use the same device and keyboard for all phases
Work in a quiet environment when possible
Take breaks between phases if needed
enrollment_instructions.privacy_notice: Only keystroke timing data is collected (not the actual keys typed). Your password is never stored - only the typing rhythm is analyzed.

feature_weights.explanation: Dwell time (HT) is weighted 1.5x as it's most stress-invariant according to research
